name: ml-automation-marketplace
description: End-to-end ML automation plugins for Claude Code — extensible plugin ecosystem

plugins.name: ml-automation
plugins.description: Core ML automation workflow with 10 specialized agents, Extension Protocol for plugin ecosystem, shared report bus, reflection gates, MLOps registry, and quality gates for EDA, feature engineering, training, evaluation, and deployment.

plugins.name: ml-automation-mmm
plugins.description: Media Mix Modeling extension for ml-automation. Bayesian MMM with adstock, saturation, channel attribution, and client-ready reporting. Hooks into core workflows at after-eda and after-evaluation.
